zh.lifeSummary: 當Isabelle de Mowbray於1396年出生在英國格盧斯特斯爾時，她的父親Sir Thomas de Mowbray 1st Duke of Norfolk30歲，母親Elizabeth FitzAlan30歲。她於1410年4月9日與Sir James Berkeley在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1452年9月29日在英國格盧斯特斯爾貝克萊享年56歲，埋葬在英國格盧斯特斯爾格盧斯特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Isabelle de Mowbray于1396年出生在英国格盧斯特斯爾时，她的父亲Sir Thomas de Mowbray 1st Duke of Norfolk30岁，母亲Elizabeth FitzAlan30岁。她于1410年4月9日与Sir James Berkeley在英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1452年9月29日在英国格盧斯特斯爾貝克萊享年56岁，埋葬在英国格盧斯特斯爾格盧斯特。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Mowbray
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (northern; of Norman origin): habitational name from Montbray (Manche). Robert de Mowbray was Earl of Northumbria 1086–95, but was later imprisoned and deposed for rebelling against William II.

variants.name: Mulberry
meanings: English (Middlesex and Cambridgeshire): variant of   Mowbray  .
Irish (Derry): Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Maoilbhearaigh ‘descendant of the devotee of (Saint) Bearach’.

variants.name: Mayberry
meanings: English: most probably an altered form of   Mowbray  . It is also found as   Maybury  , which has the form of an English habitational name. There is a place near Woking in Surrey so called; however, this is not recorded until 1885 and is probably derived from the surname. In England this surname is found mainly in the West Midlands; it has also spread into Wales. In Ireland this form is common in Ulster; MacLysaght records that it was taken there from England in the 17th century.

nameMeanings.name: Isabelle
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   Isabel  , now in frequent use in the English-speaking world.

variants.name: Isabel
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

en.lifeSummary: When Isabelle de Mowbray was born in 1396, in Gloucestershire, England, her father, Sir Thomas de Mowbray 1st Duke of Norfolk, was 30 and her mother, Elizabeth FitzAlan, was 30. She married Sir James Berkeley on 9 April 1410, in Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 3 daughters. She died on 29 September 1452, in Berkeley, Gloucestershire, England, at the age of 56, and was buried in Gloucester, Gloucestershire, England.

fr.Raglan, Monmouthshire, Wales: Raglan, Monmouthshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Isabelle de Mowbray est née en 1396, à Gloucestershire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Thomas de Mowbray 1st Duke of Norfolk, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth FitzAlan, avait 30 ans. Elle a épousé Sir James Berkeley le 9 avril 1410, à Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 29 septembre 1452, à Berkeley, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 56 ans, et a été enterrée à Gloucester, Gloucestershire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Isabelle de Mowbray 1396 in Gloucestershire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Thomas de Mowbray 1st Duke of Norfolk 30 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth FitzAlan 30. Sie hat am 9. April 1410 in Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom Sir James Berkeley geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 29. September 1452 im Alter von 56 Jahren in Berkeley, Gloucestershire, England und wurde in Gloucester, Gloucestershire, England begraben.

ht.Raglan, Monmouthshire, Wales: Raglan, Monmouthshire, Pays de Galles, United Kingdom

it.lifeSummary: Quando Isabelle de Mowbray è nata il nel 1396 nel Gloucestershire, England, sua padre, Sir Thomas de Mowbray 1st Duke of Norfolk, aveva 30 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth FitzAlan, aveva 30 anni. Lei sposato Sir James Berkeley il 9 aprile 1410, nel Gloucestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 29 settembre 1452, nel Berkeley, Gloucestershire, England, all'età di 56 anni, e fu sepolta a Gloucester, Gloucestershire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Isabelle de Mowbrayが1396年にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアで生まれた時，父Sir Thomas de Mowbray 1st Duke of Norfolkは30歳，母Elizabeth FitzAlanは30歳であった。1410年4月9日にイギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアでSir James Berkeleyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1452年9月29日にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアバーケリーで56歳で死去し，イギリスグロウセステルシュアイアグロウセスターにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Isabelle de Mowbray(이)가 1396년 영국 그루스스터실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Thomas de Mowbray 1st Duke of Norfolk(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth FitzAlan(은)는 30세였다. 그녀는 1410년 4월 9일 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르에서 Sir James Berkeley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1452년 9월 29일 영국 그루스스터실르 버켈리에서 56세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 그루스스터실르 그루스스터에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Isabelle de Mowbray nasceu em 1396, em Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Thomas de Mowbray 1st Duke of Norfolk, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth FitzAlan, tinha 30 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir James Berkeley em 9 de abril de 1410, em Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 29 de setembro de 1452, em Berkeley, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, com 56 anos, e foi sepultada em Gloucester, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra.

ro.Raglan, Monmouthshire, Wales: Raglan, Monmouthshire, Țara Galilor, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Isabelle de Mowbray родилась в 1396 г. в местности глоусестиршир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Thomas de Mowbray 1st Duke of Norfolk было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth FitzAlan, 30. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir James Berkeley 9 апреля 1410 г. в местности глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла 29 сентября 1452 г. в местности биркели, глоусестиршир, Англия в возрасте 56 лет и была похоронена в местности глоусестир, глоусестиршир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Isabelle de Mowbray nació en 1396, en Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Thomas de Mowbray 1st Duke of Norfolk, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Elizabeth FitzAlan, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Sir James Berkeley el 9 de abril de 1410, en Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 29 de septiembre de 1452, en Berkeley, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 56 años, y fue sepultada en Gloucester, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra.
